title: Totem Highlight Updated
description: Adds a red background around totems in your inventory...Useful for CPvP (1.21.11+ Compatible)
body:
**Higlights totems in your inventory.**

**Optionally pair with** [**CIT Resewn Continuation (For 1.21.11+)**](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/cit-resewn-continuation/files/8148774) **to have offhanded totems not appear highlighted.**

![Replace this with a description](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/b7b96b04c5c9d8eb693b8a2b522af2178a29fd3c.png)

_I am not affiliated with_ [_themasterkitty_](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/totem-highlight) _in any way. This is my own product taken inspiration from them--updated to the latest versions._
